string.text: Era's Immersive HUD
Era's Immersive HUD

Toggle your HUD with a single hotkey. Each element below can be set to Always show, Always hide, or Toggle with Hotkey (hidden until you press the key). Bind your hotkey first as it is unbound by default.
Reveal triggers temporarily show an element when its visibility mode (set below) is "Toggle with Hotkey". Setting an element to "Always hide" overrides its reveal triggers and keeps it hidden.

Set how each HUD element behaves: Always show, Always hide, or Toggle with Hotkey (hidden until you press the toggle hotkey). "Always hide" takes precedence over the auto-reveal triggers above, except for the on-damage and new-status reveals.
Always show
Always hide
Toggle with Hotkey
Toggle HUD hotkey
The key that shows or hides the HUD. Pressing it flips every element set to "Toggle with Hotkey" between shown and hidden. Elements set to "Toggle with Hotkey" start hidden each time a save loads.
Hotkey modifier
An optional modifier (Shift, Ctrl, or Alt) that must be held together with the toggle hotkey for it to fire.
Auto-hide after showing
When enabled, toggling the HUD with the hotkey automatically hides it again after the "reveal duration" set below (in seconds).
Reveal duration (seconds)
Long-press hold time (seconds needed to lock)
Hold the toggle hotkey for at least this long to pin the HUD on.
Long-press to lock (pin) the HUD on
When enabled, holding the toggle hotkey (for the duration set below) pins the HUD on, ignoring the auto-hide timer until you tap the hotkey again.
Show "locked" indicator when pinned
While the HUD is pinned on, show a small lock icon on the bottom left so you know it is pinned and ignoring the auto-hide timer.
Show health and statuses while in inventory
While your inventory or PDA is open, show BHS health HUD and status effects.
Show PDA messages while in inventory
While your inventory or PDA is open, show the bottom-left news pop-ups (pickups, tips, task updates, faction messages).
Show health when taking damage
When you take a hit or psy damage the BHS hud will show.
Keep panel shown while hurt

Requires "Show health when taking damage". When damage reveals the BHS panel, keep it on screen for as long as you stay hurt (health or psy not full), ignoring the auto-hide timer. You can still hide it manually with the toggle hotkey.
Show stamina bar when sprinting

While the BHS panel is hidden, reveal just the stamina bar once you have spent about 10% of your stamina, and keep it shown until it refills. The BHS panel still shows its stamina bar as normal when it is revealed.
Show radiation bar when irradiated
While the radiation bar is hidden, reveal it whenever you are irradiated, and keep it shown until your radiation returns to zero. Might not work well with different BHS texture mods.
Show status effects when a new one appears
When a new status-effect icon appears (radiation, bleeding, hunger, a food/med buff, etc.) briefly reveal the status-effect bar, then auto-hide it after the reveal duration.
Show ammo when weapon is drawn
While the ammo and weapon HUD is hidden, reveal it whenever a weapon is in your hands, and hide it again when you holster.
Show ammo when magazine isn't full

While the ammo and weapon HUD is hidden, reveal it whenever your equipped weapon's magazine is not full, so you can see your remaining rounds, and hide it again once you reload to full. Might work weird with magazine mods.
Show ammo briefly after firing
While the ammo and weapon HUD is hidden, reveal it for the reveal duration each time you fire (even if the magazine is still full), then auto-hide it again.
Ammo and weapon HUD
The weapon icon, ammo count, and fire-mode indicator.
Minimap
Radiation bar
The radiation bar above the stamina bar.
Body-health panel (BHS)
BHS and psy health bar.
Status effect icons
The status-effect icons such as hunger, thirst, radiation, bleeding, etc.
PDA messages
The bottom-left news pop-ups (pickups, tips, task updates, faction messages).
PDA notification icon
The small notification icon on the right that shows when a new PDA message arrives.
Companion list
The on-screen companion list (health and distance) shown when you have squad members.
